The '''''Claw''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in service with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The ''Claw'' had attempted to prevent [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] who had [[Raid on the Suprosa|secured]] the [[Death Star II plans]] from the armed [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Suprosa]]'' from reaching [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]].

While hampering the Rebels' [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] systems, it launched its own [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] complement to deal with the [[Task force/Legends|task force]]. However, despite assistance from the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Hunter (Victory I-class)|''Hunter'']], the Rebels managed to drive the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] away so that they could escape to their intended destination.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
If the player is quick enough, it is possible to destroy the ''Claw'' before it jumps out.
